questions.question: Explain the time complexity of Merge Sort algorithm, considering both the best and worst-case scenarios. Provide a brief explanation of how the algorithm's performance changes in these scenarios. (5 marks)
Write a pseudo-code for the Quick Sort algorithm, implementing the 'Lomuto' partition scheme and explain its time complexity. (5 marks)
Describe the process of traversing a Binary Tree using In-Order, Pre-Order, and Post-Order traversal methods. Provide examples to illustrate the differences between these methods. (10 marks)
